name: Jaws of Hell
short_description: A psychological FPS-Puzzle-Adventure-boomer shooter set before The Hive Pandemic. Clark is an ex-farmer, husband, and future bounty hunter-who escapes to Mars after losing everything. But when alien tech surfaces and visions of your ex-wife Angela pull you into the Hive, reality begins to fracture.

name: 0N35H07
short_description: 0N35H07 (ONESHOT) - arcade first/third person 3d shooter about balls that shoot lasers at each others. It's free game, and it's source code is open to view and change. Multiplayer, decent bot AI, character customization, amazing soundtrack.

name: 仙门守护者
short_description: An oriental xianxia tower defense strategy game where you build magical immortal towers and cultivate powerful cultivators to defend your sect against hordes of invading demons, featuring character cultivation, formation construction and real-time tactical defense

name: ESTRELLAS MECANICAS - La gran chispa Tournament
short_description: Total action! Enjoy a dynamic beat 'em up with platform shooter elements in intense arena combat. Choose your warrior, master their special attacks, and unleash fast, fluid combos in this retro tournament to stop a galactic threat.

name: Awakeness: YALDA Night
short_description: Awakeness is a first-person psychological horror set in Barzakh, a higher layer of reality where space and emotion distort. Explore looping corridors, solve subtle environmental puzzles, and evade an unseen presence using stealth and light.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Cryptr
short_description: An old evil is loose and spreading. Fight through cursed dungeons with up to three friends, or solo with AI allies. Loot, level up, and build your own classes and dungeons to share.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Loot +18
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Dice Carnival
short_description: Dice Carnival is a roguelike score-chaser where you roll, bank, and chain dice into explosive combos. Collect powerful Tokens, pick your Tour, crush chapter Bosses, and push your score beyond the limit.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: The Hust Banhmi | Bánh Mì Bách Khoa
short_description: The sequel to Brother Hai's Pho Restaurant! While a manhunt unfolds elsewhere, in an unrelated development, you're a HUST student selling Banh Mi at the legendary Parabol Gate. Manage your cart and keep the sales booming!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: walk
short_description: it's about walking
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: World Tree Ranch: Elven Legacy
short_description: You awaken with no memories in a tranquil elven village devoted to worshipping the World Tree. All the elves living here are girls, and they have a unique request—they ask for your help in having children...
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Breadwalk
short_description: There is war going on. But you need to buy bread.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Gone Exploring
short_description: One curious octopus. One underwater research centre. The long way home. A short 3D point-and-click adventure about a small escape - played with all eight hands.

name: DarkRay
short_description: The world was destroyed overnight. Under the ruins of the city are dark catacombs, radioactive sewers and mutated creatures that have made the dungeon their home. You're a cat. And you need to get out.

name: Pomodoro: Focus Timer
short_description: A beautiful Pomodoro focus timer for study and deep work. Run timed focus sessions, take real breaks, and play nature sounds like rain and ocean. Built to cut procrastination and help studying, ADHD, and autism. Six aesthetic themes, ten ambient sounds, six languages, fully offline.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Ops
short_description: Defend Earth from hostile aliens and hungry chupacabras in this modern classic arcade game. Created by a couple of real life VLA Operators!

name: 夏まつり零
short_description: とある夏の日、二人の少女と村で遊ぶことに 的あて、水鉄砲、虫相撲、縄跳び、鬼ごっこ、花火… しかし夜になると、突然一人だけいなくなってしまい… いろんな遊び満載の、とある夏の日の出来事

name: ERODE
short_description: ERODE is a rogue like game with integrated elements. Four kinds of elemental stones are combined in different ways to form a variety of weapons and equipment. Gameplay and art style are constantly improving.

name: Hyper Hitmans
short_description: FEATURES 🎯 Fast-Paced AI Combat 🔭 Precision Sniping 🤝 AI Team Battles 🌈 Bright Hyper-Casual Visuals 🎮 Skill-Based Gunplay 🏆 Victory beneath sight 🎬 Highlight-Worthy Gameplay ♾️ Endless Replayability
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Pixel Q (Your Personal AI Agent)
short_description: Pixel Q is a fully local, one‑time purchase AI assistant. Five specialized models for voice chat, PC control, file analysis and schedule management. No subscription. High‑risk actions always require your permission. Your data never leaves your PC.

name: Cozy Radiation Cleaner
short_description: Cozy Radiation Cleaner is a dark post-apocalyptic exploration and cleanup game where you scan dangerous zones, locate radioactive objects, and restore contaminated environments using specialized equipment and radiation detection tools.

name: The Guest
short_description: An atmospheric mystery visual novel where an unexpected guest arrives at your door. Make choices, uncover hidden secrets, and discover the truth behind a story filled with suspense, intrigue, and multiple possible outcomes.

name: Funge
short_description: A minimalist programming puzzle game based on a modified version of the esolang Befunge. Learn its unique rules, execute your code, and conquer mind-bending logic challenges.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: When We Had Wings
short_description: In a world full of flightless birds, your goal is to find an ancient artifact called the Sky Stone which is said to restore the power of flight to all birds. Explore a world above the clouds, steering and controlling a hot air balloon in VR. Manipulate your environment to solve puzzles.

name: Deep Reach
short_description: Deep Reach is a calm desktop idle game. Your little ship drifts through an abandoned galaxy mining, scanning and decoding lost signals on its own. No pressure, no enemies; just quiet discovery in the corner of your screen, and a soft mystery left behind by those who came before.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Again. Faster!
short_description: Again Faster is a fast-paced 2D precision platformer where every second matters. Choose and upgrade your character, master dangerous maps, avoid hazards, and climb the leaderboards with your fastest runs.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Whisker Tales
short_description: Join wise cats in an ancient, peaceful library! Click to gather knowledge crumbs, expand your library, bring color to a gray world, and send your cats into epic battles in the mysterious Sakura Room. A heartwarming, fully automated cozy/idle adventure awaits you!

name: Chessferatu
short_description: Chessferatu is a chess opening training game where you study, battle, and improve by playing real opening lines against themed opponents, then keep fighting when theory ends with live move evaluation and engine refutations.

name: Disconnect 2
short_description: Set in a striking black-and-white art style inspired by classic ’80s and ’90s punk posters, each level blends intense real-time platforming with atmospheric storytelling.

name: Race the Planet
short_description: An arcade racing game with big 40-car grids, 50+ tracks, adjustable AI, single-race and championship modes, where elbows-out action and precise racing lead to victory. Demo available soon.

name: 27 Survivors
short_description: Over a century ago, you and 99 other passengers left Earth aboard a colony ship in stasis. Now, the ship has awakened you early and you find only you and 26 other passengers remain. Make repairs and keep yourself alive while you investigate what happened to the rest of the passengers.
